CalcYouLater is installed!

You'll find it in /Applications. Open it from Launchpad or Spotlight.

Quick tips:

Use your keyboard — digits, + - * /, Enter for equals, Delete for backspace, Esc to clear all.

Click the big result number to copy it to your clipboard.

Toggle Sci for scientific functions, the clock icon for history, and the arrows icon for the unit converter.

Enjoy — and calc you later. 🧮
